findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 32. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Multiple hyperlinks with descriptive text from the PDF are rendered as plain text in the HTML without href attributes. At least five linked text spans lost their URLs.
findings.evidence: PDF has hyperlinked text for: "Division's website" (Background section, page 1), "training video" (Background section, page 1), "(available here)" (Q3 answer, page 2), "US Environmental Protection Agency" (Q7 answer, page 2), and "Division's website" (Q19 answer, page 5). All appear as plain text in the HTML with no <a href> wrapping.

findings.description: Footnote hyperlink for levee definition lost its href in the HTML.
findings.evidence: PDF page 4 footnote has hyperlinked text "Levee Terms & Definitions (army.mil)" linking to an army.mil URL. HTML footer renders it as plain text: '<sup>1</sup> Levee Terms & Definitions (army.mil)' with no <a href>.
